'''Korrda''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] and [[Adjutant/Legends|adjutant]] to [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga]]. He suffered from a wasting disease which left him thin, and as a result mocked by his fellow Hutts.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{Mo}}
